allow:
Bash(sleep 25 && curl -sv -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register \\
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:5174" \\
  -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" \\
  -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type" 2>&1 | grep "< ")

Bash(sleep 30 && curl -sv -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register \\
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:5174" \\
  -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" \\
  -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type,authorization" 2>&1 | grep "< ")

Bash(curl -sv -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register \\
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:5174" \\
  -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" \\
  -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type" 2>&1 | grep "< ")

Bash(sleep 3 && curl -sv -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register \\
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:5174" \\
  -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" \\
  -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type" 2>&1 | grep "< ")

Bash(curl -sv -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"test1234"}' 2>&1 | grep -E "\(< HTTP|{\)")
